title: Portfolio Project
description: A single project entry for the portfolio site

$schema.description: Optional JSON Schema reference for editor support

types.description: Project categories used for type filtering

date.description: Year or date range displayed on the card (e.g. "2025", "2023-2024")

title.description: Project title. Used for display, element IDs (via idFromText), and the card heading

description.description: Array of markdown paragraphs. Each element becomes a separate paragraph. Structure: concept, role/tech, outcome. Keep short and direct.

image.description: Path to the project image (relative to site root, e.g. "resources/images/projects/name.webp")

imageStretched.description: Whether the image should be stretched to fill the card width. Defaults to true if omitted.

imageAlt.description: Alt text for the project image. Falls back to "Image for {title}" if omitted.

skills.description: Technologies and skills used. Appear as filter buttons on the card. Must match existing skill names for consistent filtering (check other projects for spelling).

links.description: External links shown as icons on the card. First link is also used as the title click target.

type.description: Link icon type. Must match a filename in resources/images/icons/{type}.webp. Common values: "github", "google-play". Omit for a generic link icon.

url.description: Full URL to the external resource
